name: konomi-zoo
title: ◊ Konomi Zoo · the substrate rendered as a bestiary
subtitle: auto-generated from 2 orgs · sjgant80-hub (AIN) + teslasolar (Tesla) · every card a real repo · every card a fork-grant
lineage: Architecture: Thomas Frumkin · MianoCube · the prime recursion · Implementation: Simon Gant

factions.tagline: R0 · body · 7.83 Hz · the substrate animals
R3 · care · 31.32 Hz · the empathic ones
R6 · govern · 54.81 Hz · the cerebellum · 79% timing

abilities.charge: Can attack the turn it is played.
abilities.taunt: Enemies must attack this creature first.
abilities.shield: First damage dealt to this is absorbed.
abilities.lifesteal: Damage dealt by this heals your hero.
abilities.rush: Can attack creatures (not hero) on the turn played.
abilities.mesh: When played: draw a card if opponent has a creature with your ring.
abilities.forge: Spend +2 mana when playing to make this +2/+2.
abilities.konomi: Damage from this cannot be absorbed by shield.
abilities.recurse: When destroyed: return to your hand with +1/+1.
abilities.timing: Resolves first in turn order regardless of play order (R0→R6).
abilities.substrate: Cannot be silenced or removed by enemy spells.
